snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.imdb.createmovie(
    title="title",
    rating=1.1,
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.imdb.createmovie(
        title="title",
        rating=1.1,
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.imdb.getmovie(
        movie_id="movieId",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
